Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

uncertain.reason: Appears to be an internal payroll/accounting code that could link to an individual but does not map cleanly to a listed PII rule.
Routing numbers are sensitive financial identifiers but not explicitly listed among allowed PII rules.
Looks like a reference/filing number format that could be linkable but is not covered by specified rules.
Described as an invalid CUSIP-like string; potential identifier class not covered by the rules.
City and ZIP can contribute to re-identification, but there is no general US address rule in the allowed set.
Job role and employer can help identify a person but do not match a specific allowed PII rule when isolated.
